fixedDuringScrutiny.description: accounting/AGENTS.md documented TallyImportController path as /api/v1/migration/tally/import but actual path is /api/v1/migration/tally-import (hyphen, not slash)
accounting/AGENTS.md documented OpeningBalanceImportController path as /api/v1/migration/opening-balance/import but actual path is /api/v1/accounting/opening-balances
reports.md referenced non-existent /api/v1/portal/finance/statements and /api/v1/portal/finance/supplier-statements as canonical replacements for account statements
fixedDuringScrutiny.fix: Removed false replacement paths; marked as no internal replacement exists (account-statement endpoint returns dealer-only rollup)

fixedDuringScrutiny.description: reports.md cross-reference to docs/workflows/accounting-and-period-close.md pointed to non-existent file
Known Gaps section claimed 'No hierarchical P&L variant' but GET /api/v1/reports/income-statement/hierarchy exists
fixedDuringScrutiny.fix: Updated to acknowledge the endpoint exists but is not yet documented in the P&L section

nonBlockingIssues.description: Undocumented endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/inventory-reconciliation exists in ReportController.java but is not mentioned in reports.md
nonBlockingIssues.suggestion: Add inventory-reconciliation endpoint to the reports.md documentation in a future pass

nonBlockingIssues.description: HR AGENTS.md references AccountingCoreEngineCore.postPayrollRun() directly when the actual call chain goes through AccountingFacade
nonBlockingIssues.suggestion: Update to reference AccountingFacade as the visible interface in PayrollPostingService

nonBlockingIssues.description: HR AGENTS.md uses speculative language about legacy HR endpoints that may not exist
nonBlockingIssues.suggestion: Either identify specific legacy endpoints or note none were found in the current codebase

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a step requiring workers to verify all endpoint paths against openapi.json or actual controller @RequestMapping annotations before documenting. Three of the endpoint paths in the deprecated-seams feature were inaccurate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docs-finance-reporting-deprecated-seams feature had three incorrect endpoint paths: tally/import vs tally-import, opening-balance/import vs accounting/opening-balances, and portal/finance/statements which does not exist.

rejectedObservations.observation: reports.md is not listed in INDEX.md module table (only in MODULE-INVENTORY.md)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a pre-existing discoverability gap not introduced by this milestone's features. The INDEX.md module table coverage is a separate cleanup task for a later milestone.
